// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all default services.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.GetUserHandler, global::TestNamespace.GetUserHandler>();
            services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.GenericHandler<,>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.GenericHandler<,>));
            services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.IRequestHandler<,>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.GenericHandler<,>));
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.Consumer>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) =>
            {
                var p0 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<global::TestNamespace.IRequestHandler<global::TestNamespace.ListUsersRequest, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::TestNamespace.User>>>>();
                var s0 = new global::TestNamespace.Consumer(p0);
                return s0;
            });
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.GenericHandler<global::TestNamespace.ListUsersRequest, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::TestNamespace.User>>, global::TestNamespace.GenericHandler<global::TestNamespace.ListUsersRequest, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::TestNamespace.User>>>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IRequestHandler<global::TestNamespace.ListUsersRequest, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::TestNamespace.User>>, global::TestNamespace.GenericHandler<global::TestNamespace.ListUsersRequest, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::TestNamespace.User>>>();

            return services;
        }
    }
}
